verifications.name: Impossible to use Iwato scale in a 12-tone row
verifications.constraint: ForAll([i], And(i >= 1, i <= 12, is_in_scale(row_note(row, i), iwato_scale), Distinct(row_note(row, 1), row_note(row, 2), row_note(row, 3), row_note(row, 4), row_note(row, 5), row_note(row, 6), row_note(row, 7), row_note(row, 8), row_note(row, 9), row_note(row, 10), row_note(row, 11), row_note(row, 12))))
